query:
SELECT 'radcheck' as table_name, username, attribute, op, value
FROM radcheck
WHERE username IN (SELECT username FROM radius_cards WHERE createdBy = 17 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'radreply' as table_name, username, attribute, op, value
FROM radreply
WHERE username IN (SELECT username FROM radius_cards WHERE createdBy = 17 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1);
